name: Thai Basil Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat up a wok; add oil and stir fry garlic and green onions until tender but not browned, about 1-2 minutes.
2. Add chili peppers and cook, stirring, about 1 minute more.
3. Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked through.
4. Stir in basil and fish sauce; mix thoroughly.
5. Serve over rice, if desired.
